ghost_echo_protocol.action: Reverse-reverb on the first syllable/note of a theme
ghost_echo_protocol.pre_delay: Synchronized to 1/2 or 1/4 note before the hit
ghost_echo_protocol.mixing: Fade-in duration: 500ms. End point: Zero cross-fade with the dry signal
ghost_echo_protocol.goal: Creating the sense of 'Sound pulling itself out of the Void'.
